relationships: ber:Akken ma tellam, ṛuḥet ɣer taddart
ber:Ttadfeɣ ɣer uxxam war ma giɣ lḥess
ber:Ur zmireɣ ara ad cfuɣ ɣef yismawen-nsent akken ma llant
ber:Yedda seg usarag-nni war ma iger-as yiwen tamawt
ber:Yanni yella itteg taflest deg umidaw-nnes war ma yessken-as-d
ber:Akken ma tellam, ulac d acu i iyi-tettalasem!
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧam-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧamt-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Ur ttaddam ara ayga-a deg leḥsab, ma ulac aɣilif
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧid-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Tzemremt, akken ma tellamt, ad teqqimemt, ur tettewliwilemt ara﹖
ber:Ǧǧemt-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan, ma ulac aɣilif
ber:Ǧǧet-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan, ma ulac aɣilif
ber:Ad awent-d-iseɣ tapizza akken ma tellamt
ber:Tom ur yezmir ara ad tent-id-iseɣ akken ma llant
ber:Eǧǧ-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan, ma ulac aɣilif
ber:Leḥṣin-nni mmɣen-d fell-as yeɛdawen war ma faqen wid-nni ay yellan deg-s
ber:Ad awent-ixelleṣ tapizza akken ma tellamt
ber:Tom ur yezmir ara ad ten-id-iseɣ akken ma llan
ber:Yeffeɣ seg texxamt-nni war ma iger-as yiwen tamawt
ber:Amanda teɣli deg tayri n yiwen n Udzayri war ma tessken-as-d
ber:Yeffeɣ seg tzeqqa-nni war ma iger-as yiwen tamawt
ber:Zzayer tettwaslelli akken ma tella deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ sḍimraw sin
ber:Asafag n Tom yeqqim la iɣelli deg tegriwelt war ma yessaweḍ ad t-yeḥkem
ber:Akken ma tellamt tgamt amahil yelhan
ber:Ulac akk sanda ay yetteddu Tom war ma yewwi asawal-nnes
ber:Akken ma tellam tgam amahil yelhan
ber:Tom yemmut sdeffir ma yekka acḥal netta yuḍen
ber:Tenna-d axir ma tṛuḥ s axxam
ber:Aya yesɛa azal ameqran ɣer wiyaḍ akken ma llan
